60.code: while(f(str[i])<=f(op[idx2-1])&&idx2>=0)//让运算符出栈，直到当前的待入栈算符的优先级严格大于栈顶算符优先级
60.reason: 当idx2为0时，op[idx2-1]访问op[-1]导致越界，应改为idx2>0

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  当idx2为0时，op[idx2-1]访问op[-1]导致越界，应改为idx2>0

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Accesses op[idx2-1] before checking idx2>=0, causing an out-of-bounds read when idx2 becomes 0 after popping. The condition should be `while(idx2>0 && f(str[i])<=f(op[idx2-1]))`.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  逻辑错误：&&运算符从左到右求值，应先判断idx2>0防止栈空时访问op[-1]导致越界；且idx2>=0应改为idx2>0，因为idx2表示栈中元素个数，为0时栈已空。
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Condition order causes out-of-bounds access when idx2 is 0. Should be 'idx2>0 && f(str[i])<=f(op[idx2-1])'.
